entry.title: SAP Task Center’s New 3rd Party Integration
entry.content:
Exciting Business Update:

SAP Task Center Introduces Cutting-Edge Third-Party Integration Capability!

Businesses and partners, take note – SAP Task Center has just unveiled a groundbreaking new capability that has the potential to redefine task management for third-party applications. This highly anticipated feature empowers customers and partners to seamlessly build and connect task providers for non-SAP and legacy applications within the Task Center, ushering in a centralized platform for streamlined task management.  

In a strategic move towards offering enhanced flexibility and integration options, SAP Task Center now supports the much-coveted Third-Party scenario. This pivotal integration allows businesses to seamlessly connect other systems with their core business processes, creating a seamless workflow where tasks generated by third-party services are automatically synchronized with the SAP Task Center. With a unified task view, businesses can optimize resource allocation and boost productivity across multiple platforms, all while ensuring the security and reliability of sensitive business data through SAP's robust APIs.

For those keen to delve deeper, our published adoption guide provides a comprehensive resource for interface and API implementation, as well as security and authentication set-up:

SAP Task Center Adoption Guide

SAP Task Center Documentation

Furthermore, while SAP Task Center's free standard plan already offers integration with supported SAP cloud solutions, our on-premise and third-party service plans open up a world of untapped potential. Explore the full range of options at SAP Discovery Center.

TaskConnect

In a synergistic collaboration announced at SAP TechEd 2023, SAP has proudly partnered with SAP Partner ITCE, a leading Bulgarian consulting and training company operating across the Central and Eastern European (CEE) region. Our joint endeavor has yielded TaskConnect, a revolutionary solution developed in collaboration with SAP architects and technical consultants. TaskConnect serves as the essential bridge, offering seamless integration support for non-SAP service management systems and allowing businesses to effortlessly bring in IT service management tasks, such as incidents and approvals, directly into SAP Task Center.

Are you ready to take your task management to the next level?

Join us as we continue to redefine the boundaries of task management and integration, and unlock a world of unparalleled efficiency. Let's make it happen – together!

Get more information: 

  • SAP Discovery Center
  • ITCE
  • TaskConnect

entry.title: SAP Developer News, July 4th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/07/04/sap-developer-news-july-4th-2024/

SAP Samples on GitHub and the BTP Resource Consumption Monitor repo

  • SAP Samples organization on GitHub: https://github.com/SAP-samples
  • BTP FinOps: Keeping Track of your Credits: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/btp-finops-keeping-track-of-your-credits/ba-p/13737793
  • BTP Resource Consumption Monitor repository: https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor

Current Customer Engagement Initiatives

  • SAPUI5 2.x: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/adapt-your-app-to-sapui5-2-x-make-an-impact-by-joining-our-cei-project/ba-p/13722775
  • SAP BTP: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3724

July Developer Challenge “Reverse APIs”

  • Main July challenge blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/2024-07-quot-reverse-apis-quot-sap-developer-challenge/ba-p/13749653
  • Task 0 Server and service provisioning https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/2024-07-developer-challenge-task-0-server-and-service-provisioning/m-p/13749996
  • Previous (June) challenge final week discussion https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/submissions-for-quot-sap-hana-cloud-multi-model-quot-developer-challenge/m-p/13744012

SAP Build Governance How-To Guides Published

  • SAP Build Governance Resource Center: https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=bGf3QlX0PEKC9twtmXka9wZKKG5THS9PkxADEwX46a9UQUk5N0dKVjNGWU5FTlFPVDRTRDBLTEMwWC4u
  • Try the SAP Build Governance Resource Center https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/don-t-want-to-start-from-scratch-with-it-governance-try-the-sap-build/ba-p/13729865

The Open Documentation Initiative & the revamped SAP Help Portal comments feature

  • The Grand Prix of Developer Feedback  (blog post) https://community.sap.com/t5/open-documentation-initiative-blog-posts/the-grand-prix-of-developer-feedback/ba-p/13734863

==============================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 SAP Samples on GitHub and the BTP Resource Consumption Monitor repo

1:11 Current Customer Engagement Initiatives

2:14 July Developer Challenge “Reverse APIs”

3:43 SAP Build Governance How-To Guides Published

5:11 The Open Documentation Initiative & the revamped SAP Help Portal comments feature

TRANSCRIPT

[Antonio] Hola SAP developers. I don't know about you, but I've learned a lot from the sample code that's available in the SAP Samples organization on GitHub. Whatever you're interested in, be it CAP, RAP, AI, connectivity with event brokers, it is likely that you will find a good sample in the reports available there. For example, the latest cool report that I've popped into is the BTP Resource Consumption Monitor by my colleague Willem, who recently also publish a blog post about what the tool can do for you. In essence, keep track of your CPEA, BTPEA credits. The tool has a bunch of things, billing verification, cost breakdown, credit expenditure, monetary analytics, even suggestions for account optimization and cost reduction strategies. And all the code and details to get it running are there for you to explore. Make sure to check it out. I'm including the links in the description below.

[Nico] Hi everyone and welcome to the SAP Developer News. I'm on an early morning walk with the little one, who for some reason seems to be sleeping better outdoors, and I thought I would use the time wisely and record the developer news. So, we would like to point your attention to two customer engagement initiatives that are currently running. The first one is about SAPUI5 2.0. So, the team is looking for feedback and is willing to provide some more insights and help on how to migrate from SAPUI5 version 1 to 2. The second initiative is about SAP BTP and is specifically for SAP BTP admins and solution architects. Again, the team is looking for feedback and is willing to provide some more insights and help with the overall goal of improving the user experience on the platform. These initiatives are really your chance to shape the future of those two products and I very much invite you to participate. and I see you soon, bye.

[DJ] The June Developer Challenge run by my good friend and colleague Vitaly is coming to a close. It's not too late to finish off the tasks though, but July is here and that means we have a new Developer Challenge for you. We're calling it Reverse APIs because essentially It's a reflection on last August's developer challenge on APIs. But this time, it's you that have to create the APIs. API endpoints in services that will be tested by an orthophysic testing mech. Sounds scary? Not at all, because you'll have the power and magic of CAP at your disposal. The whole idea is to learn, to explore, to discover all the features that CAP has to offer when building services and API endpoints. There are ten tasks in this challenge, reflecting ten different API endpoints that you're going to create over three different services over the course of this month, plus a little warm-up task, Task Zero, that is an easy way to start off, and that Task Zero has already been published. head over to the blog post which explains everything and links you to this first task to get going. See you, all right.

[Rekha] Hello, everybody. I hope you're all having a good time. Are you an IT administrator or IT professional looking to streamline and scale your SAP build fusion development efforts? Then it is crucial to have a robust governance framework in place. Effective governance ensures that your organization's software projects are delivered quickly, securely, efficiently, and in alignment with your organizational goals and compliance requirements. SAP has now launched SAP Build Governance Resource Center website. Inside this web page, you will find a package of valuable assets like digital center of excellence toolkit, use case body tool, how to guide for use cases ideation, and fusion development project lifecycle management, guided experience step-by-step tutorial, FAQs, presentation on SAP Build Governance, essential quick links, and SAP Help documentation links for best practices. By consolidating all the resources I just mentioned into a single and easy to navigate platform, SAP Build Governance Resource Center empowers you to operate and scale your Fusion development programs with confidence. I hope you found this update exciting. Thank you.

[DJ] A couple of years ago, we launched the Open Documentation Initiative to allow, to encourage you to collaborate with us on documentation, either by providing feedback or contributing fixes and improvements to the documentation via the universal global content collaboration mechanism and platform that is GitHub. Recently, you might have noticed that there's also been some revamping of an existing feature directly on the SAP Help Portal. That's the comments feature which some may find more straightforward to use to contribute comments while perusing the documentation. We want to know what you prefer. Jens Hailey has written a blog post all about this new revamp and also describing what we want to achieve by asking you to help us find out the difference between the two approaches. Read all about it in Jens's blog post. The link is in the description.

entry.title: SAP Build 的新增功能 – 2024 年第 2 季度版本
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接What’s New in SAP Build – Q2 2024 Edition，原文作者Jesse Sukhbayar。

开发者们，你们好！

随着我们将 SAP Build产品更紧密地整合在了一起，我们很高兴地宣布，现在我们的所有新功能都将整合到一个概览的博客中。SAP Build是一套全面的低代码和专业代码解决方案，旨在利用生成式 AI 加速应用开发和自动化。下面，我们来看看 SAP Build 2024 年第 2 季度的最新功能亮点！

增强 SAP Build 的集成：为了提高产品之间的互操作性，我们推出了 SAP Build Apps 与 SAP Build Process Automation 之间的集成功能。该增强可简化项目间部件的可维护性和高效重用。现在，无需手动 API 配置即可无缝探索和重用已发布的流程。

下面列出了产品特定的更新：

  • SAP Build Apps
  • SAP Build Work Zone、SAP Start 和 SAP Task Center
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Code

SAP Build Apps

导出后端数据：对于后端项目，现在可以将可视云功能数据导出到 Excel 文件。这使您可以轻松编辑和定制数据，并将其重新导入到数据浏览器中。今年早些时候，我们还为可视化云功能引入了角色和访问管理，从而增强了我们的内置治理功能。

 

默认情况下启用 BTP 身份验证：又一个适用于 SAP BTP 身份验证的更新。在此之前，通常需要从“权限”选项卡启用验证 - 我们移除了此步骤，因此现在默认情况下会为所有新应用程序启用 BTP 验证。这允许您充分利用 BTP 集成并从其他 SAP 系统访问数据。 今年还发布了移动身份验证，进一步改善了移动应用程序的企业就绪度。

  • 详细了解 SAP Build Apps 路线图的最新动态。

SAP Build Work Zone、SAP Start 和 SAP Task Center

SAP Build Work Zone（高级版）

工作区的创建流程和成员处理：在工作区的一组新功能中，您将找到新的工作区创建对话框、取消将外部工作区作为单独的工作区类型、提供了私有和公共工作区之间的一致用户体验以及扩展的访问控制概念。有关详细信息，请参阅此博客帖子。

 

统一的访问控制设置：访问控制设置已在所有工作区屏幕中对齐，并提供相同的访问选项。

支持将卡片作为应用可视化类型：现在支持将卡片作为本地应用的可视化类型，并在内容管理器（应用编辑器）可视化标签中进行维护。

基于角色的卡过滤：随着内容管理器过渡到作为卡管理工具后，所有卡都将分配给角色，并且将在运行时根据用户角色进行访问。

 

迁移现有独立卡：客户之前上传到管理控制台的卡将迁移到内容管理器。这些卡将在本地应用实现可视化，并将分配给所有人角色。

使用卡可视化直接部署应用：现在支持将包含卡可视化的应用程序直接从 SAP Business Application Studio 的 SAP Build Work Zone 开发工具扩展部署到子账户。

知识库集成：与 SAP Service Cloud Version 2 中的原生知识库小组件集成可用，并且可以进行相应配置。

SAP Start

集成更多云解决方案：SAP Fieldglass 将加入与 SAP Start 集成的可用 SAP 云解决方案列表，并且可以使用新的洞察卡。有关详细信息，请查看由 Kerstin Ott 撰写的此博客帖子。

 

SAP Task Center

支持第三方任务提供商：现在可以将第三方任务提供商连接到 SAP Task Center。这是客户和合作伙伴最期待的功能之一。更多信息，请参见 连接第三方任务提供商和 SAP Task Center 。

已启用公共视图：您现在可以访问关键用户预定义的公共视图。有关详细信息，请参阅使用视图和为终端用户创建公共视图。

支持新操作“申请、发布和转发”：申请、发布和转发现在可用于 SAP S/4HANA、SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公有云版本）和 SAP S/4HANA Cloud（私有云版本）中的任务。

有关 SAP Build Work Zone、SAP Start 和 SAP Task Center 的详细信息：

  • 查看 SAP Build Work Zone 标准版和高级版和 SAP Start/SAP Task Center 的路线图
  • 以及 标准版/高级版本/SAP Start/SAP Task Center 的新功能查看器

SAP Build Process Automation

 

从 SAP Intelligent RPA 轻松迁移到 SAP Build Process Automation：现在可以更快、更轻松地从 SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation (iRPA) 迁移到 SAP Build Process Automation。SAP Intelligent RPA 中新的产品内迁移功能通过将现有 iRPA 环境转换为 SAP Build Process Automation 来简化升级流程。不需要更复杂的导入或导出。它将机器人、工作流和其他自动化资产升级到 SAP Build Process Automation。您将受益于集成的无代码/低代码环境，从而加速流程自动化并提高生产力。有关如何迁移的详细指南，请访问 SAP 产品经理 @Alex-Fortin 的 SAP Community 博客帖子或我们的迁移指南。

 

 

 

与 SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh (AEM高级事件网格)的集成也已推出，提供超出基本集成之外的功能，以及强大的事件管理功能。  SAP 为事件驱动集成提供了两种解决方案：SAP Integration Suite、Advanced Event Mesh (AEM) 和 SAP Event Mesh。虽然两者都利用事件代理进行集成，但 AEM 凭借以下几个不同的优势脱颖而出：

  • 强大的事件管理功能可确保数据完整性、合规性和生命周期管理。
  • 提供跨各种公共云（AWS、Azure、GCP）、企业预置(on-premises)或边缘的灵活部署选项。
  • 能够处理大量的有效负载和大量的存储需求，使其成为复杂事件驱动架构的理想选择。
  • 全面管理事件的整个生命周期，包括设计、发布、发现和重放消息，以便排除故障或开发新应用程序。

有关如何设置 的详细信息，请参阅文档与高级事件网格（Advanced Event Mesh) 连接。

了解有关 SAP Build Process Automation 的更多信息：

  • 有关更多更新和改进，请参阅 What's New Viewer（新增功能查看器）。
  • 有关更多即将推出的功能和重点区域，请参阅 SAP Road Map Explorer。

SAP Build Code

SAP Build Code全面推出 + SAP S/4HANA 演示：SAP Build Code 于 3 月全面推出，我们很高兴看到许多开发人员正在测试并分享他们的反馈。如果您想将 SAP Business Application Studio 实例升级到 SAP Build Code，请查看产品经理 Rupa Maity 的博客。您还可以在此演示中了解 SAP Build Code 如何集成 S/4HANA Cloud 中的数据。

SAP Fiori 工具增强：SAP Build Code 的第二季度更新中对 SAP Fiori 工具进行了多项增强。最新版本在页面编辑器中引入了gen AI 功能、语义按钮等。有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP Fiori 工具发布博客。

 

SAPUI5 调整项目：SAP Business Application Studio 现在支持扩展 SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公共版）- 使用 SAPUI5 调整项目的重要功能。这允许您在无需更改原始应用程序的情况下，创建满足特定业务需求的应用程序变式。现在还可以在 SAP BTP ABAP 环境中使用 SAPUI5 调整项目。有关详细信息，请参阅 Help Portal。

MDK 的改进：最后，移动开发工具包 (MDK) 在其最新版本中引入了多项改进，包括新的 Fiori 样式工具栏、标签上方的附加控件等。请参阅 MDK 客户端 24.4 中的新增功能。

  • 了解有关 SAP Build Code 社区的更多信息。

👍喜欢阅读有关更新的信息吗？您对哪种增强功能跃跃欲试？通过评论与我们分享!

请注意，此博文介绍了最新功能和增强功能的亮点。

  • 有关所有更新的完整列表，请参阅 Help Portal SAP Build 的新增功能
  • 加入 SAP Builders 小组，获取产品资源和在社区提出问题。
  • 订阅我们的电子报，通过电子邮件获取SAP Build 的最新消息。

entry.title: Wait for end of subprocess triggered in automation in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Introduction

With SAP Build Process Automation  you can create different artefacts to implement your business processes. Among them are:

  • Forms-based workflows (also known as processes)
  • Automations (for repetitive tasks)
  • Decisions (used as business rules in a process)
  • Captured applications (to be automated by bot)
  • Actions (to encapsulate APIs in processes)

Now you can mix automations and processes so a bot will have some role to play in the execution of a process. We have different scenarios:

  1. A process triggers another sub-process
    • In that case, the sub-process must reach its end before we resume the execution of the parent process
  2. A process triggers an automation
    • To resume the execution of the process, the automation must end first. It is a synchronous execution.
  3. An automation triggers another automation
    • If the child automation is a new job, it is totally independent from the parent automation. So the parent automation will just request the execution of a new job and continues its flow. The execution of the child automation will occur later on.
    • If the child automation is not a new job, then it is considered as a sub-automation and it must complete before the execution of the parent automation resumes.
  4. An automation triggers a process
    • As for a new job, the automation will trigger the execution of a process. But because of the long running definition of a process, where human can interact, it is not possible for the bot to wait the process to be complete. In that case, we will have to find another way to implement this ‘waiting action’.

Waiting actions

As explained in the introduction, it is generally not recommended to wait for the execution of a process within an automation. In this article, I’ll focus on the implementation of a waiting mechanism in a process.

Definition of the use case

Let’s imagine we have a business process. In this process, we are using Action artefacts to perform some API calls to external systems. As of now, in order to call actions in a loop, we need to use an automation.

Let’s say we have another bunch of actions to execute, but in order to execute them, we have to wait for the completion of the first batch of actions. So we have another automation, that should be trigger only when the subprocesses triggered in the first automations are completed.

To sum up, we have the following:

And we need to find a way to implement the Wait step, since the existing Wait tools cannot determine when the instances of Process A will be finished.

Tools

To implement this wait mechanism, we will need the following:

  • Action to get the status of subprocesses (available here)
  • Decision to check the status of all subprocesses (see documentation)
  • Business key in the subprocesses (see documentation for definition of business key)

Implementation

First thing, you need to create an Action project, using the API available here. You can keep all the attributes from the action, or you can also remove some of them. But the most important one, that you need to keep, is the following:

You might also need to remove the Max Length of the responseArray.definitionId attribute in the Output tab:

Note : you would need to use a Destination to be able to use that action in a process. In my case, the destination is configured like below:

where the URL is https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/public/workflow/rest

Check the service key you created from the SAP Build Process Automation instance to know what URL you should use.

 

Once the action project is released and published to the library, let’s focus on the business project.

From the Lobby, let’s create a Business Process project. Here, you can add a Form trigger, or an API trigger, depending on your needs. Let’s add an automation, which will be designed to trigger the subprocess A. Ex:

In order to be able to determine that all subprocesses A from one specific instance of the parent process are completed, let’s add the Process Instance Id of the parent process as input parameter of the subprocess A (and of the automation as well). In the main process, we get the following:

And in the subprocess, let’s map that input to the Business Key:

By doing so, we make sure that all subprocesses created in a specific instance of the parent process will have the same business key. As a reminder, we created an Action project, where we could pass a value for the Business Key parameter. So we need to add it in the main business process, after the execution of the automation.

At this point, we have the status of all the instances of subprocess A, triggered in Automation 1. Now we need to determine what to do next. We have 3 possibilities:

  1. All the subprocesses are COMPLETED, and we can proceed further in the execution of the main process
  2. There is at least one error in the execution of the subprocess, and we need to stop the execution of the main process
  3. There is still (at least) one instance RUNNING, and we need to wait until all the subprocesses are either completed or failed.

That’s where we use a Decision. For that, let’s create a DataType with an attribute ‘status’ as a string. It will be used as input parameter of the Decision:

For the rule, we can create a Text rule:

Where each aggregate function COUNT is configured like below:

1
2
3 

Now the Decision is set up, let’s map the input data:

We create a list of objects, taking the status and the id from the response of the action artefact. And in the decision, we check the value of each ‘status’ attribute.

At this point, we do have a way to determine the global status of the main flow. Let’s just add some conditions in the process to manage the different steps (warn user of error, wait, or proceed further):

Where the conditions are defined like below:

and:

 

Conclusion

This is a way to make sure the waiting action happen in the process, to avoid a long running automation. You can of course adapt this structure, by configuring the waiting time between each check of all subprocess’ status, or by modifying the Decision so it suits your needs.

entry.title: Enabling SAP Build Process Automation's My Inbox App in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Problem Statement

This blog is primarily targeted to those facing an issue where you have subscribed both SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition but can't see / add / enable My Inbox App into your SAP Build Work Zone portal.

This issue happened when users do manual subscription of SAP Build Process Automation service and SAP Build Work Zone service; some extra configuration is required when you want to use SAP Build Work Zone with SAP Build Process Automation.
 
Unfortunately, if you're evaluating both SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone service on SAP BTP Trial landscape, there's no guided booster available for these services on Trial so you will likely encounter this issue.

When the guided booster is made available in your BTP global account, please use it, as it will make your life much easier.

Resolution: Configure SAP Build Process Automation Destinations

This step is also documented in official help documentation of SAP Build Process Automation here.

Step 1: Create a service instance and service key for SAP Build Process Automation

Navigate to Services > Service Marketplace > Create a new service instance for SAP Build Process Automation.

Select `standard` plan.

Once a service instance created successfully, next step is to create a service key. You will see a new entry under `Service Keys` section.

You will see this pop-up, when you click your service key.

Do note down the following field and its value:

  • "api" under "endpoints"
  • "clientid" under "uaa"
  • "clientsecret" under"uaa"
  • "url" under"uaa"
  • "app_host_id" under "html5-apps-repo"
  • "saasregistryenabled"
  • "sap.cloud.service"
  • "sap.cloud.service.alias"
Step 2: Create and configure destination

Navigate to Connectivity > Destinations > Create a new destination.

Enter following details:

Field

Value

Name

sap_process_automation_service

Type

HTTP

Proxy Type

Internet

Authentication

OAuth2ClientCredentials

URL

<”endpoints”.”api”>

Client ID

<"uaa"."clientid”>

Client Secret

<"uaa"."clientsecret”>

Token Service URL

<"uaa"."url">/oauth/token

  Also enter below as additional properties:

Field

Value

endpoints

endpoints (copy the whole JSON structure including ‘{‘ and ‘}’)

Example:
{"api":"https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com"}

html5-apps-repo

html5-apps-repo (copy the whole JSON structure including ‘{‘ and ‘}’)

Example:

{"app_host_id":"xxxxxxxx-e05b-4654-a999-30de519f64b4,ad4b900b-4bf1-4965-a6a6-d71ce7fc5300,9cd6ff5e-f33f-459e-90de-35e17719e6e1,3be0da62-2508-4691-8794-abcdfg"}

saasregistryenabled

saasregistryenabled copied from the service key

sap.cloud.service

sap.cloud.service copied from the service key

sap.cloud.service.alias

sap.cloud.service.alias copied from the service key

The entry should looked like below:

If you want a quick way, just modify below configuration (update the important fields with the values from your service key) and save it as `spba_destination.txt` and import into Destinations:

 

#clientSecret=<< Existing password/certificate removed on export >>
#
#Tue Jul 09 02:57:54 UTC 2024
Type=HTTP
clientId=sb-xxxxcxxx-6df1-477c-95f4-abcdefgh2b97\!abc123|xsuaa\!abc123
saasregistryenabled=true
endpoints={"api"\:"https\://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com"}
sap.cloud.service.alias=spa
Authentication=OAuth2ClientCredentials
Name=sap_process_automation_service
html5-apps-repo={"app_host_id"\:"xxxxxxxx-e05b-4654-a999-30de519f64b4,ad4b900b-4bf1-4965-a6a6-d71ce7fc5300,9cd6ff5e-f33f-459e-90de-35e17719e6e1,3be0da62-2508-4691-8794-abcdfg"}
tokenServiceURL=https\://sap-build-demo-xxxxxxxx.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
ProxyType=Internet
URL=https\://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com
tokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
sap.cloud.service=com.sap.spa.processautomation
CEP.EnableCsrfProtection=true

 

Once you have done all steps above, do a quick a `Check Connection` test, and it should show you `401: Unauthorized` (this is a correct response):

Step 3: Success

When you launch your SAP Build Work Zone's site manager, you should be able to see My Inbox App and other HTML5 Apps that comes with SAP Build Process Automation in the `Content Explorer`.

If My Inbox App is not visible there yet, navigate to `Content Manager` and do a content refresh first.

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: SAP Developer News, July 11th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/07/11/sap-developer-news-july11th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

SAP TechEd 2024

  • TechEd Event Website https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html

SAP CodeJam Latin America Roadshow

  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇨🇱 🇦🇷 🇨🇴 (August 8th - 21st 2024): https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2024-latin-america-edition-august-8th-21st-2024/ba-p/13710015

July Developer Challenge on “Reverse APIs” - a reminder

  • July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs" blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/july-developer-challenge-quot-reverse-apis-quot/ba-p/13749653

openSAP Migration to learning.sap.com

  • New home of openSAP content: https://learning.sap.com/courses?page=1&subtype=mooc-content

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 SAP TechEd 2024

2:18 SAP CodeJam Latin America Roadshow

2:52 July Developer Challenge on “Reverse APIs” - a reminder

3:51 openSAP Migration to learning.sap.com

TRANSCRIPT

[Tom] Hi there everybody, I'm here with Kasimir The Cat, the official SAP TechEd mascot and she's very excited for TechEd this year, as you can tell. We're doing lots to get ready for TechEd already, even though it's several months away. We've got some great new things planned for you this year. First of all, we want to bring more of the TechEd experience to you where you're at. So as already announced, we're going to have the TechEd On Tour events. These are going to be in-person events that focus on the hands-on exercise experience and we're going to bring them to more regions of the world and work together with the user groups to bring you that experience. So be on the lookout for more details about that soon.

But of course, we also have the TechEd Virtual experience, the free online event experience, And I know our team is working really hard on content for that already. We're going to be doing a Developer Keynote Deconstructed. So throughout the two days, we're going to bring you different parts of a developer keynote highlighting major new innovations for developers in all different parts of the SAP ecosystem.

And finally, we have Devtoberfest again this year, and we're going to be bringing you Devtoberfest wrapped around TechEd, a little different this year because we're going to do two weeks before the virtual TechEd and two weeks after the virtual TechEd with Devtoberfest. That way we can help you prepare for TechEd and also do deeper dive follow-ups to some of the key TechEd content through Devtoberfest. And as always, we'll have the big contest. It will also tie into exercises from the TechEd virtual event as well. So be able to look out over the next couple of weeks for information on all these great aspects of TechEd, and also look forward to seeing more of Casimir the cat. So say goodbye, everybody. Bye, Kasimir. [Meow!]

[Antonio] Hola, SAP Developers. We are less than a month away from the start of the SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Latin America. The CodeJams we will be doing are Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh and SAP Build. In São Paulo, Brazil, it's fully booked. But we still have available spaces in the events of Santiago, Chile, Buenos Aires, Argentina, Bogotá, Colombia. See you soon.

[DJ] Hello. We just wanted to quickly remind you that this month's SAP Developer Challenge on reverse APIs is well underway. What do we mean by reverse APIs? Well, basically, we get you to set up services using CAP and API endpoints in those services, and we call those endpoints automatically to check you set them up as required. There's tons to discover and learn about. By the time you see this SAP Developer News episode, we'll have released the next task, that'll be the fourth one, out of a total of 12 that you'll have to complete this month.

Next week, the tasks revolve around creating endpoints in a more plain RESTful style service. Anyway, the link to the main challenge blog post is in the description, so head on over to to the blog post now and get started with the tasks and don't forget to have fun!

[Tom] As someone who has been involved with openSAP since its very beginning, I'm happy to see that the content from openSAP lives on as a part of the SAP Learning website. Many of the courses have been migrated over to the learning site and you can now find them unified with all the other learning journeys and free content to help you prepare for certification. Now the old openSAP website is only going to be available till the end of July, so don't forget to go in and download any certifications or other completion documents that you have there. But most of the recent content is going to live on and I think we can look forward to seeing other openSAP style content in the future on the SAP Learning Platform. So be sure to check it out in its new home there.

entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化处理雇用到退休流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Hire-to-Retire processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

简介

在不断变化的劳动力管理环境中，“从雇佣到退休”的概念已成为一种超越传统招聘流程的变革性方法。雇用到退休包含全面的战略框架，强调员工在组织内的整个旅程，从初始雇用阶段到最终退休。还可以按以下步骤进行汇总：

从雇佣到退休的理念不仅仅是一个人力资源流行词；这是一种整体的人才管理方法，它凸显了员工职业生涯的每个阶段在组织中的重要性。通过专注于招聘、持续学习、绩效管理、员工幸福感和无缝的退休过渡，企业能够打造一支灵活且富有韧性的员工队伍，在不断变化的业务环境中实现持续成功。为了确保这一持续成功，每个组织都需要提供顺畅的人力资源流程，以避免常见的难题：

 

  • 招聘流程效率低下
  • 入职体验不佳
  • 缺少持续学习机会
  • 绩效管理效率低下
  • 员工敬业度有限
  • 继任计划不足
  • 忽视员工幸福感
  • 退休过渡面临的挑战
  • 技术和数据管理不足

 

在本博文中，我想向您展示如何利用企业自动化来克服雇用到退休领域的低效流程、重复性任务和不良的流程管理。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性：

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

雇用到退休的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。预构建内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化雇用到退休而设计的内容示例：

录用通知书分发 – SuccessFactors

SAP ECC 监控和健康检查

授权推出机器人

职位需求的创建和审批

创建社会保障证书

合同员工结束日期扩展

筛选问题 (API) - SuccessFactors

EC 工作流自动化 – SuccessFactors

面向 SAP SuccessFactors 中电子分离的流程自动化包

重复简历标识的流程自动化

生成离职员工清单（使用 SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central）(4P4)

列出离职员工的未完成活动 (4JF)

工作录用通知审批

 

将此内容转化成您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

 

下一步，我们要跳转到一个实用的方案，向您展示如何将企业自动化用于雇用到退休。在任何企业中，入职流程都是一项至关重要的活动，会影响新员工的体验和成功。我个人是 sap 的工作学生，每隔 6 个月轮流到新部门。因此，我经常面对入职流程，需要新的培训和系统访问权限来支持团队。通过这种体验，我可以说，如果不正确，入职流程可能涉及手动和重复性任务，从而导致低效和延迟。因此，企业需要一款能够实现无缝集成、流程自动化和定制的解决方案，为新员工提供个性化的入职体验。


SAP Integration Suite 与 SAP Build Process Automation 和 SAP Signavio 相结合，提供了全面的解决方案来解决入职流程中的挑战。通过利用基于事件的集成模式、低代码/无代码工作流以及 Business Technology Platform 的强大功能，企业能够扩展和定制登录体验，与第三方工具集成，自动化活动并简化共享服务流程。

 

作为第一步，我们建议使用 SAP Signavio Process Insights 评估新员工的内部入职流程，并确定低效的流程步骤。

瓶颈和手动任务会导致新员工和 HR 业务伙伴的用户体验不满意。

 

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中，您可以执行根本原因分析以分析入职流程中容易出错且可能导致较长周期的各种步骤。

其中包括为新员工提供合适的设备、分配必要的培训以及负责系统对各种软件组件的访问。

 

利用 SAP Integration Suite 利用基于事件的通信主动启动流程自动化。

您可以启用应用程序、集成和扩展以通过业务事件异步通信 - 在本例中是 SAP SuccessFactors。

我们可以订阅业务事件，以便在新员工进入系统后收到通知。在消息传递代理中，您可以查看租用来自 SAP SuccessFactors 的业务事件的队列。现在，每次生成新录用员工时，都会注意到这一点，并触发了预定义的自动活动。 

 

在下一步中，我们将根据业务规则和决策表自动触发新流程，以识别正确的培训分配和设备。为此，我们可以利用 SAP Build Process Automation 的 LCNC 设计时间。

我们可以通过消息传递代理与来自 SAP SuccessFactors 的上下文数据进行交互。 

 

 

通过嵌入式决策功能，您可以将业务逻辑应用于流程。 

在此，它用于确定根据工作角色适用的培训和设备。 可以轻松地对此进行定制，例如添加附加参数或数学运算符。

 

HR 业务伙伴在 我的收件箱 应用程序中接收此任务，并且可以在一个位置审核所有相关数据。他们可以发表评论并批准或拒绝表单，以便进行人工干预。 

批准此流程后，我们可以将数据处理回 SAP SuccessFactors。

 

我们还可以利用自定义集成流连接到第三方应用程序，并将适配器用于多个通信协议。

在此，我们在 SAP Ariba 中生成采购申请，以确保正确的设备在工作第一天可用。

 

因此，在 SAP Ariba 中生成采购申请，并且已在 SAP Service Cloud 中为 IT 管理员维护 IT 消息。

 

结论

 

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在雇用到退休上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

 

当然，如果你想快速开启低代码开发之旅，加入我们的 SAP Builders 社区，开始学习 SAP Build 解决方案！

entry.title: 利用SAP 企业自动化处理寻源到付款流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Source-to-Pay processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

 

简介

寻源到付款世界是全球企业采购和财务管理领域的基石。从确定采购需求到最终向供应商付款这一全面的流程，在优化效率、降低成本和确保合规性方面发挥着关键作用。寻源到付款流程的重要性是多方面的，包括完成以下操作的多个步骤：

 

最后，寻源到付款流程是现代企业成功的关键。它超越了交易效率，包括战略寻源、风险管理、合规和财务控制。通过实施数字化转型并利用先进的寻源到付款解决方案，企业不仅能够实现采购目标，还能在不断变化的业务环境中推动可持续的业务增长和竞争优势。许多企业在寻源到付款流程中面临以下难题：

 

  • 手动流程，缺乏自动化
  • 数据质量低下，可视性差
  • 分散的系统和数据孤岛
  • 供应商关系管理不善
  • 复杂的审批流程
  • 独立采购           
  • 有限的支出可视性
  • 无效的供应商授权
  • 发票差异
  • 缺乏战略寻源

 

现在，我们将了解如何利用企业自动化来克服寻源到付款流程中的这些挑战，并确保流程顺畅且高度自动化。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性。

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

寻源到付款的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在这里，您可以找到一些专为优化寻源到付款而设计的内容示例：

创建采购申请 (BAPI)

通过 Excel 创建采购申请

从电子邮件提取供应商发票文件并上载到 SAP Central Invoice Management

创建开票凭证 - VF01 (ECC) Cloud Studio

Ariba 采购申请审批

物料 BOM 更改 - CS02 (ECC)

收货采购订单 - ECC (MIGO)

收货检验批次供应商谈判

采购申请抬头审批和审批操作

创建收货 (BAPI)

使用付款时付款条款的供应商发票的账龄分析

采购申请审批和审批

管理无采购订单的发票

将此内容转化您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

用例

开始使用企业自动化的最佳方法是使用具体的用例。在这里，我们将重点关注一个场景，该场景经常出现在许多组织中，并且是低效和重复性活动的根本原因：每次需要在 SAP 中处理新的采购订单时，都会包括缺少需要手动添加的主数据。在此，我们正在利用 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 识别缺少物料代码的采购订单凭证。识别非编码物料后，我们将在 SAP Build 中触发流程以相应地分配物料代码。此外，我们还利用机器学习技术来确定合适的供应商。在此图中，您可以看到非编码物料的自动采购组分配如何：

 

与往常一样，我们建议从 Signavio Process Insights 开始，评估您的流程架构并识别您最大的自动化潜力。在此，您可以深入了解您的寻源到付款领域，并以较低的自动化率查看流程步骤。

您还将收到来自标准 SAP 应用程序或 SAP Build 的直接改进建议和最佳实践。

 

您可以利用 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 分析成功处理采购订单凭证需要处理的不同步骤。 

在此，我们以复杂的方式评估单个流程实例，并评估采购订单处理的平均周期时间。

 

使用此工具，您可以获得富有洞察力的流程绩效指标，例如缺少物料代码的采购订单数量。

您可以快速意识到，具有非编码物料的采购订单会导致业务用户的中断和重复性任务。

此外，您可以利用与 SAP Build 的本机连接并应用业务逻辑直接触发流程，而无需人工干预。

因此，每次确定非编码采购订单时，我们都会在 SAP Build 中启动流程实例。

为了让人员处于循环中，您可以向业务用户发送审批通知，以进行数据验证和异常处理。

通过此方法，您可以使工作流中的上下文数据可供业务用户查看。

 

使用 SAP Build Process Automation 的低代码设计器执行流程。 

在此场景中，我们启动步骤以识别正确的物料代码，并使用机器学习将正确的供应商映射到每个凭证。在流程逻辑结束时，工作流使用本机连接器直接在 SAP S/4HANA 中过账缺少的物料代码。

 

为了实现非常复杂的集成体系结构，我们还包括 SAP Integration Suite 来处理多个系统中的采购订单凭证。

在此，我们利用预构建的集成流在 SAP Business Suite 企业预置系统中复制采购订单。

 

结论

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在寻源到付款上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化处理销售线索到收款流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Lead-to-Cash processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

简介

在现代业务的动态架构中，企业面临着将潜在销售线索高效转化为收入的挑战。销售线索到现金流程在此过程中起着关键作用，包括从销售线索生成到现金收款的各个阶段。销售、营销和财务职能的无缝集成对于持续的业务增长和成功至关重要。现代销售线索到收款流程包括以下步骤：

 

通过优先考虑从销售线索生成到现金收款的无缝活动流，企业能够优化资源，提升客户体验，并在各自行业中扮演敏捷且响应迅速的企业。但是，许多企业都面临着从销售线索到现金的难题，这与流程管理不佳密切相关：

 

  • 客户旅程不明确
  • 销售线索跟踪和管理流程不足
  • 销售团队与营销团队之间沟通不畅
  • 流程期间的数据捕获不足
  • 数据质量问题
  • 难以准确预测销售目标
  • 客户启用周期较长
  • 延迟开票付款或收款问题

 

在本博文中，我想向您展示如何利用企业自动化来克服销售线索到现金领域的低效流程、重复性任务和不良的流程管理。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性：

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。
  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。
  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

 

销售线索到收款的预构建内容

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化从线索到收款而设计的内容示例：

通过 Excel 自动创建销售订单

使用参考创建产品主数据

使用灵活工作流的销售订单审批扩展示例

线索到订单的智能工作流

使用 Excel 通过电子邮件自动创建销售订单

创建客户物料信息记录

批量维护销售合同

根据非结构化数据自动创建销售订单请求

项目经理项目创建

项目活动触发器

 

将此内容用于您的优势 - 因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

让我们用一个用例来具体了解一下！销售订单处理是“销售线索到现金”领域的常见场景。它可以包括用户体验和流程执行方面的特定需求。例如，数据验证的层次审批步骤或用于分类折扣规则或客户细分的复杂业务规则。或将销售订单创建连接到多个记录系统的特定集成要求。在此，您可以查看场景外观的概览：

我们建议从 SAP Signavio Process Insights 开始。在此，您可以查看流程架构并评估端到端场景，如销售线索到收款、寻源到付款和记录到报表。

根据你的数据发现卓越实践和改进建议，并对标行业标准。在这里，你可以看到“销售线索到收款”业务线中出现的低效场景，这些场景具有较高的自动化潜力。您还可以直接获得 SAP Business Accelerator Hub 中预构建内容的建议：

 

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中，您可以执行流程挖掘以深入了解整个销售线索到收款流程，并深入了解销售订单凭证创建的每个流程变式。

发现不同的流变化并确定需要改进的瓶颈，例如销售订单凭证的手动处理：

 

 

基于 BPMN 2.0 可视化流程，并查看 SAP S/4HANA 中订单创建的所有必要步骤。您还可以与利益相关方协作，以确定改进领域并确定其优先级。

 

 

发现 SAP Signavio 的流程效率低下后，您可以跳转到 SAP Build 以生成自定义扩展。在这种情况下，我们利用 SAP Build Apps 创建可定制的移动应用，以增强销售订单处理。每个销售代表都可以使用该自定义应用，将新销售订单输入到记录系统中。

为此，我们利用基于低代码的设计时间，并在开发流程中包括多个利益相关方：

 

 

 

还可以使用流程自动化扩展应用程序，以协调工作流场景和 Robotic Process Automation (RPA)。

通过可定制的审批步骤、业务规则、机器学习和与 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的本机连接，在 SAP S/4HANA 中执行销售订单创建流程：

 

 

 

在下一个屏幕截图中，您可以看到用于检查和审批销售订单凭证的嵌入式表单构建器。然后，审批人可以与 SAP Task Center 中的流程任务进行交互，例如批准或拒绝销售订单凭证。

通过此工具，您可以利用直观的拖放功能以及预先开发的 UI 元素：

 

除本机连接器外，您还可以使用表面自动化轻松集成到 SAP 和非 SAP 系统。

这是使用经典 RPA 功能（如屏幕录制和屏幕捕获）自动执行重复和手动任务的常用方法。在这种情况下，我们可以将新的销售订单凭证输入到 SAP S/4HANA 或将交易数据或主数据复制到系统中：

在开发项目中，您会很快注意到的一点是，您无法实现任何无法集成的自动化。尽管 SAP Build 允许您连接到 SAP 和非 SAP 系统，但 SAP Integration Suite 可以将连接引入完全不同的级别。

使用此工具，您可以生成自己的集成流，以将流程连接到异构 IT 架构中的任意类型的应用程序。 利用预构建内容，通过高级值映射和消息转换在第三方应用程序中复制销售订单凭证：

 

 

结论

 

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在“销售线索到收款”上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

 

当然，如果你想快速开启低代码开发之旅，加入我们的 SAP Builders 社区，开始学习 SAP Build 解决方案！

entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化实现记录到报告流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Record-to-Report processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

 

简介

记录到报告是一个重要的财务流程，对寻求透明度、问责制和战略决策的组织来说至关重要。此综合流程涉及财务交易的记录、处理和报告，最终导致创建准确可靠的财务报表。以下是汇总记录到报告流程的主要步骤和活动：

 

总之，记录到报告流程是财务管理的支柱，为组织成功奠定了基础。其影响不仅限于合规性，还涉及战略决策、风险管理和利益相关方关系。如果执行不当，则无法促进弹性、敏捷和透明的财务框架，并导致企业组织面临以下难题：  

 

  • 订单处理延迟
  • 客户信息不完整或不准确
  • 库存管理挑战
  • 与客户沟通效率低下
  • 信用和开票问题
  • 无效订单履行
  • 发票争议和核算问题
  • 付款处理挑战
  • 客户服务和支持问题
  • 法规合规性问题

 

在本博文中，我们将向您展示如何利用 SAP 的企业自动化来管理和优化订单到收款流程。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性。

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

 

 

记录到报告的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。预构建内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化记录到报告而设计的内容示例：

从电子邮件提取供应商发票文件并上载到 SAP Central Invoice Management

总账科目条目的建议重新分类

在不影响财务过账的情况下，批量更新总账日记账分录明细

批量更新资产主数据

批量上载付款通知

自动上载总账分录

批量上传银行对账单文件

自动批量上载总账日记账分录

自动收货/收发票清算

应计过账的批量自动化

总账主记录创建流程

创建收货 (BAPI)

日记账分录过账审批

催款运行 - F150 (ECC)

 

将此内容转化为您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

让我们通过真实用例深入了解这个主题！如果没有简化和自动化过账新总账科目等财务流程，则可能需要手动和重复活动。尤其是当业务组织需要特定流程流来满足合规性和法规要求时。这包括用于审批人确定的业务规则、总账科目的不同分类或各种条件或阈值（也需要考虑）。

在此，您可以看到 S/4HANA 中基于审批的总账科目过账的外观：

我们建议从 SAP Signavio Process Insights 开始，以获取流程架构和最大自动化潜力的初始概览。获取直接改进建议，了解记录到报告方面的预构建内容和卓越实践。

在此，您可以利用 Robotic Process Automation 机器人和工作流流程来改进财务流程。所有建议均在 Signavio 中列出，如屏幕截图所示：

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中启动调查，以进一步了解财务关账、日记账分录过账或在总账中处理新记录等场景。

生成有关流程绩效指标（如平均周期时间或流程相关性）的分析仪表盘。

 

为了过账新的总账科目，您可以为业务用户提供中央访问点，以访问 SAP 和非 SAP 源中的应用程序和流程。此中央访问点随 SAP Build Work Zone（标准版）提供。

业务用户可以直接从主页启动创建总账科目的流程。

 

在此，您可以查看直观的表单应用程序，以允许业务用户将流程实例作为自助服务触发。 

在这种情况下，您可以启动审批工作流以在 SAP S/4HANA 中创建新总账科目。

 

在流程逻辑中，您可以引入审批人并处理利益相关方以验证关键数据并确保合规性。 

现在，业务用户可以丰富附加信息并相应地审批账户。

 

使用 SAP Build Process Automation 开发具有预构建流程活动的自定义流程，可以在图形布局设计器中进行配置。

设计单个审批工作流并处理用于过账总账科目的业务规则。

 

项目用于生产后，您可以检查每个流程实例的状态并检查关键业务数据。

申请者可以检查已发送审批的新客户的状态。

 

连接到各种后端系统，以进行数据验证、数据转换和实体映射。

在此，您还可以利用连接器集合在审批表单中检索总账科目编号范围详细信息。

 

 

结论

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在记录到报告上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

entry.title: Unleashing Centralized Digital Experience for Suppliers – SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
A Wave of Modern Digital Workplace

In today's business landscape, digitalization and innovation pose significant challenges for companies. To meet the ever-evolving needs of customers, businesses must swiftly adopt cloud solutions. However, progress is often hindered by limited resources and the complexities of maintaining IT infrastructures with multiple applications. To overcome these challenges, companies need to adopt digital processes, reduce technological obstacles, and empower both experts and citizen developers to drive innovation. 

This blog post will explore how SAP Build Workzone empowers companies to unleash the full potential of their central digital workplace, creating a more connected and efficient ecosystem for suppliers.


Background & Business Challenges

Customer is committed to becoming an Intelligent Enterprise by leveraging the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). To achieve this, they are dedicated to modernizing and replacing outdated business processes, empowering IT professionals and business users with tools to efficiently create engaging business sites for employees, partners, suppliers, and customers. A suitable replacement for the current landscape of supplier resources and applications is imperative. The scattered information throughout the enterprise lacks a centralized access point, causing inefficiencies in navigating through numerous disconnected systems. Decentralized content creation further hinders the development of flexible business sites and pages. The customer’s objective is to boost user productivity and engagement through interactive workspaces, forums, and knowledge-based articles. By centralizing information and facilitating efficient content creation, the company aims to create a seamless and productive environment for all users.

 

Customer's Vision to Elevate Supplier Engagement

The vision for the Supplier Portal is the ultimate centralized platform for Vendors/Suppliers and external partners. The aim is to provide easy access to all necessary resources in one location, including the Supplier Handbook, Supplier Resources, Proxied Applications, Contingent Worker Resources, and the option to access the Restricted Supplier Portal content. The customer worked with the SAP MaxAttention team to create a Digital Workplace that is agile and consistent with SAP's user experience. In this process, the team incorporated the latest innovations of BTP to provide a better user experience and easier content management. After a successful proof-of-concept, the team confidently deployed the updated content for productive usage through internal and external user onboarding processes

 

SAP MaxAttention Engagement

The success of this project is a true testament to SAP MaxAttention’s expertise and commitment to delivering exceptional results. During this engagement, SAP MaxAttention team worked along with SAP Build Work Zone Product Development and the customer’s CoE teams. This collaboration resulted in quick ROI and increased value by maximizing existing SAP solutions, specifically in the space of SAP Build subscription. SAP Build is powered by SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) which enables business experts to easily create and augment enterprise applications, automate tedious processes, and design engaging business sites by using visual tools and a rich set of services and pre-built content. SAP Build capabilities include:

  • SAP Build Code – SAP Build Code provides generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development. It offers a turn-key environment for coding, testing, integrations, and application lifecycle management.
  • SAP Build Apps – Evolution of AppGyver to build mobile and web applications with a pixel-perfect design using the drag-and-drop functionality and a rich component library.
  • SAP Build Process Automation – Offers task and process automation leveraging robotic process automation (RPA) bots, workflows, forms, embedded artificial intelligence (AI), business rules, and decisions.
  • SAP Build Work Zone – Allows the creation of enterprise-grade custom business sites using new capabilities such as a flexible page builder and context-aware integrated UI cards.

Architecture

Below is the architecture of the digital Supplier Portal in SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition.

Delivery Scope

Setup of SAP Build Work Zone

For the platform preparation, we started with onboarding activities in SAP BTP, for example, Sub-account setup, setting up SAML Trust with PingIDP for authentication, user management & provisioning, and authorization management, data privacy, workspace setup to configure areas and workspace.

Building a Central Entry Point (Home Page)

The company's home page has been redesigned and now serves as the landing page for the website, featuring protected content. The customer team has been given the authority to distinguish between the administrative aspects of the SAP Build Work Zone landing page and to use pre-built templates and layouts to implement best practices. The objective is to differentiate between the usage of different widgets and to decide whether to build a Workspace or leave the content on the Home Page.

Supplier Handbook

Supplier Handbook workspace hosts a collection of key resources and assets (e.g., revision-controlled documents) used by customer’s Vendors/Suppliers. Private workspace access is only for onboard suppliers. Some of the key requirements were to have an intuitive user experience, manage contents and their versions, and send communication to the stakeholders whenever changes are made to the contents. 

Supplier Resources

Supplier Resources is a public workspace that hosts a collection of resources and assets needed for supplier onboarding. The customer’s prospective and established suppliers can find all the publicly available documents, process documentation, and answers to frequently asked questions related to the customer’s Account Payable, Invoicing Process, etc. This workspace also provides an entry point to the Supplier Handbook that provides access to protected resources.

Just-In-Time Reports Integration via SAP Build Process Automation

One of the requirements of the project is to enable vendors to view stocking reports in real-time. To achieve this, we leveraged SAP Build Process Automation.  SAP Build Process Automation is a citizen developer solution to adapt, improve, and innovate business processes with no-code workflow management and robotic process automation capabilities.
Using this tool, we developed unattended BOT to publish reports from BI and S/4HANA. On a periodical basis, automatic synch between the FTP and the SAP Build Work Zone is triggered. This business requirement was prototyped using SAP Build Work Zone OData API. The below diagrams illustrate the technical architecture of the solution.  

Supplier Registration Forms

To fulfill the need for supplier diversity, the existing registration form for suppliers to request access to a private workspace contains various form controls. The form includes multipage reports, and dynamic content, and retains automatic answers to meet the key requirements.

Outcomes

Empowered Business Users with Enterprise-Grade Business Sites

SAP Build Work Zone advanced edition enables business users to boost productivity and engagement by creating digital workplace solutions. This platform provides a central entry point for accessing business processes, applications, communication, and information from any device.

Business Value:

  • Improve productivity by accessing apps, processes, and information all in one place.
  • Experience a seamlessly integrated environment across SAP and third-party apps to accommodate collaboration tools and integrated information
  • With SAP Build Work Zone as a collaboration platform, users will have all the resources needed to make informed decisions faster
  • Say goodbye to clunky workflows, and hello to a world of efficient business apps, reports, and information that promote collaboration and drive success

Key Milestones:

  • Project Duration: < 4 months
  • Unified and Intelligent work experience by providing central access to apps, tasks, notifications, information, and communication.              
  • Optimize Business Processes with employees, partners, customers & suppliers.
  • Reduce TCO by leveraging existing investments in the SAP Business Technology Platform and harmonization of existing systems and repositories.
  • Integrated collaboration capabilities that can be extended to other business processes
  • Seamless SAP and third-party apps integration
  • Establish Central Inbox

Following are some of the business KPIs:

Contact persons:

SAP MaxAttention CoE: Kiran Kola, Rohit Dwivedi 

SAP Product Management: Florian Buech

entry.title: Processes can now be scheduled 📅!
entry.content:
You can now schedule processes – not just automation bots – in SAP Build Process Automation.

Once you deploy your process:

  1. Go into Control Tower > Environments, and open your environment.
  2. Go to Triggers.
  3. Click Add Trigger.
  4. Schedule your process by setting a schedule and providing the needed inputs for the process.

A few things I noticed:

  • You seem to be able to have an API trigger and a schedule trigger at the same time.
  • At first, I could not find how to edit or delete the trigger. But then realized that it was a little off the screen, even with my browser at 100% zoom. 
  • Seems you must schedule recurrence, though you could just limit the timeframe to prevent this recurrence from happening.
  • It's all really easy to do 😺

Document is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCTS/b078c7aa93ed4fc391e3323b7a255b84/b2b7113205ef42f688cf59ab9df4195c.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud

entry.title: Innovations Highlights from SAP Business Technology Platform - Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
Sapphire is always a highlight. But this year it was a special Sapphire. With this year´s event theme "Bring Out Your Best" our latest business AI innovations, products, and partnerships were highlighted. Take a look at this blog post where I want to focus on the most important announcements of SAP BTP at Sapphire 2024 (also non-AI related). In addition let´s explore innovation highlights coming up in the future. Enjoy reading on.

Clean Core Strategy with New SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Features

Following a clean core strategy means keeping your systems as unmodified as possible and creating your custom code in a way that does not effect upgrades and adoption of the latest innovations. But there is still the need to tailor your systems to your own businesses. To achieve this, we recommend that you go for side-by-side extensibility scenarios with SAP BTP, meaning that you build your own extensions to SAP systems on SAP BTP, whenever possible. SAP BTP offers three main options for this scenario: SAP Build low-code solutions, SAP Build Code and SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

If we look at ABAP, the first highlight is the Joule´s ABAP Developer capabilities, which will contain multiple features all tailored to increase developer efficiency. It will be the GitHub Copilot for the ABAP world embedded directly into the ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse (ADT). You will receive functionality embedded into wizards and an integrated chat. Planned GenAI features are explain ABAP code and CDS code, test and test data generation for ABAP and CDS, ABAP code completion, and many more. 

 

To simplify this process, we are building a way to access SAP Build directly from S/4HANA. Providing the ability to access SAP Build directly and with context from SAP S/4HANA, your development teams and their business stakeholders will be able to create new processes and process extensions much faster and more convenient than in the past. 

 

 

Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone

In addition the Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone let developers create step-by-step line-of-business workflows. This simplifies complex business processes through automation without custom code. With the Guided experiences, you can empower your workforce with seamless digital experiences tailored to their needs, boosting user satisfaction, engagement, and retention. You can automate tasks and streamline processes, allowing employees to focus on high-impact work.

Accelerate enterprise automation with AI

We are also enriching our Process Automation offering with Joule. Our GenAI-based copilot will help you to simply specify in natural language what kind of workflow or automation you would like to have. In addition our tools, with the help of different large language models, will help you either source these artifacts from available content, or they will generate new process and automation content for them using the power of AI.

Accelerate integration with AI

We believe that by embedding AI into SAP Integration Suite, you will be able to shorten project times and integrate applications and systems faster by using AI generated mappings, scripts, and integration flows without even needing to be a high end integration expert. The SAP Integration Suite will improve the quality of integration flows and business processes by helping you identify pre-built content packages or by supporting AI-generated artifacts that fit to your specific requirements. Same as with code or process automation artefacts, you will be able to generate integration artifacts, our so called integration flows, by leveraging generative AI and the Unified Customer Landscape service which provides your specific landscape details as context for the integration.

Anomaly detection with SAP Integration Suite

We are making use of machine-learning based capabilities in SAP Integration Suite to offer API anomaly detection. What this means is that we use Machine Learning to identify issues in your landscapes. Think of a sudden surge or drop in API calls, an increase in latency or an increase in the number of errors detected. We can identify this kind of unusual behavior and actively alert your stuff to these anomalies in API performance. This way, we can help identify and address issues before they escalate, minimizing disruptions and optimizing system performance. 

 

 

Simplified transition

How do I transition from SAP PI / PO to SAP Integration Suite? We know that many of you relying on PI/PO for the daily business and we want to make sure we safeguard the investments you have made. Therefore we will provide a simplified transition from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite with features like mass migration, reduction of migration templates, and reduction of JMS queues using a pipeline concept. Also, there is a free assessment and planning services available where we provide customer specific recommendations on how to move your integration to the cloud.

If you want to learn more what´s new for Application Development, Automation and Integration on SAP BTP  read the blog post of @thomas_volmering.

Infuse AI in SAP Analytics Cloud

How do we evolve our portfolio in the space of Data and Analytics moving forward? First: We integrate Joule as your GenAI copilot in SAP Analytics Cloud. You can analyze, consume and create story content with Joule moving forward. You also have also the possibility to ask questions and get answers as charts. Or you can generate some scripts to make the story interaction for your end-users richer and more interactive. Remember the just ask feature? This will be integrated with Joule as well. The key thing to understand is that while the just ask feature is providing natural language query capabilities, Joule will be using this feature as well, but provide a more conversational experience in remembering the conversation and the user progress and integrations.

Extended capabilities in SAP Analytics Cloud

One more thing on Data and Analytics, as it touches both the themes of openness and connectivity. Later this year it is planned that SAP Analytics Cloud content will be able to natively be integrated with Microsoft PowerPoint. Using our add-in, you can intuitively connect to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant and find user-created content to integrate into your presentation. For example stories, in which business users communicate business information using a combination of data and visual elements (like, building a heat map of North America illustrating where a company’s sales are overperforming and underperforming commercial expectations). Or Widgets, which are visual elements used to tell stories (for example, charts, tables, geographical maps, or buttons).

SAP Analytics Cloud will also let you connect to SQL data sources as live data connections. This eliminates the need for direct data replication, resulting in much faster access to real-time data, reduced data storage requirements, more reliable data consistency, improved system performance and lower costs.

More to come...

For me personally it has been a quite impressive and innovative Sapphire 2024. If you want to explore more highlights coming up in 2024 watch the replay of my session "Explore the road map of SAP BTP".

You did not make it in person or virtually? No worries, you still have the chance to watch the replays and especially the Opening Keynote of Christian Klein and Julia White. Explore the SAP Sapphire News Guide 2024  to learn more about the announcements.
Interested in more innovation highlights coming up? Then take a look at our Road Map Explorer. We do have more than 1000 innovation highlights planned for SAP BTP 2024.

Also be informed that this blog and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice.

entry.title: See how SAP Enterprise Support helps customers use SAP Build to empower their digital transformation
entry.content:
SAP Build is a comprehensive suite of low-code and pro-code tools designed to accelerate application development and automation with the power of generative AI. It is built on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) from SAP that helps accelerate development and automation. SAP Build is an enabler for everyone no matter the skill level to create and enhance enterprise applications, process automations, and business sites, all with drag-and-drop simplicity. 

Consisting of three components SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone, it empowers more users to develop irrespective of their skill level thereby lessening the burden on professional developers.

SAP Build Code is a comprehensive application development environment tailored for developers working with Java and JavaScript. The turnkey solution combines runtime and design time capabilities with built-in enterprise solution integrations, DevOps, and Application Lifecycle Management. Joule, the AI copilot that understands your business, is available to assist with code generation.

In this blog, we are elaborating the assets which are available to provide foundational Support to customers as part of their SAP Enterprise Support cloud edition subscription to use the SAP Build portfolio to empower their digital transformation. 

With SAP Enterprise Support, customers can:

  • Receive guidance and realize value through AI-powered services, best practice content, remote quality checks, and assessment services. 
  • Empower your team to gain knowledge and skills and collaborate with experts for answers to support-related questions.
  • Transform your end-to-end landscape with application lifecycle management solutions to deploy, operate, and optimize cloud and hybrid business solutions.

If you want to just gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio we have provided this SAP Build Big Picture session. In this e-learning, you will gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio including SAP Build Code. It discusses the importance of the Clean Core concept and explore the low code/no code tools available for building new applications. Additionally, a high-level overview of SAP Build Code application development, assisted by Joule, is provided. For more detail, we have provided all the overview sessions for the SAP Build portfolio in the learning program Learn to develop using low-code through SAP Build provided through the SAP Enterprise Support Value Map program.

Below we have listed the SAP Build components and the corresponding support provided to customers to get started:

SAP Build Process Automation

SAP Build Process Automation powers the automation of workflows and tasks with comprehensive workflow management, robotic process automation, and AI capabilities.  

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Process Automation. This includes an introductory session which has a demo the tool in action. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Process Automation. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Process Automation. In the first step, we give an overview of process automation in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Process Automation and customers learn how to create workflows, decision management, and task automation with powerful yet intuitive no-code capabilities through the configuration of a specific business process to approve Sales Orders automatically. Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Apps

SAP Build Apps is an evolution of SAP AppGyver and it enables users to build web and mobile enterprise applications.  With hundreds of templates and pre-built business logic components, you can jumpstart your application projects and reduce development time. 

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Apps. This includes an introductory session. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Apps. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Apps. In the first step, we give an overview of application development in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Apps and customers learn how to create mobile and web applications, connect to SAP systems, and deploy and run on SAP Business Technology Platform.​ Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Work Zone

SAP Build Work Zone, brings the capabilities of SAP Launchpad and SAP Work Zone into one solution, facilitating the rapid creation of engaging and personalized business sites. It provides centralized access to business application information on any device.

To give an overview on SAP Build Work Zone, we have created the e-learning Explore the power of SAP Build Work Zone - SAP BTP Adoption Tutorial which provides a comprehensive Central Entry Point Digital experience. It encompasses an introduction to essential tools such as SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Task Center, and SAP Mobile Start. Key topics are discussed including the capabilities of SAP Build Work Zone, both standard and advanced editions and Identity and Access management through the SAP Cloud Identity Service. Also, we take a deep dive into the One Inbox suite quality of the SAP Task Center. and SAP Mobile Start as your native mobile entry point.

To provide further information for SAP Build Work Zone, we have created additional e-learnings. Firstly, we give an overview to integrate SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Mobile Start. We walk you through the configuration process for the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition ensuring you gain a comprehensive understanding of its setup and functionalities. Also, you will gain proficiency in integrating SAP Mobile Start with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

Also, we have provided an e-learning for SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Deep Dive to effectively configure, deploy, and manage SAP Build Work Zone environments, leveraging its capabilities to enhance collaboration and productivity within your organization. The content shows how to set up SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition with integration of IAS (Identity Authentication Service) and IPS (Identity Provisioning Service) for user access, the process of creating a workspace and adding content such as How-to documents and technical support access, developing a UI Card in SAP Business Application Studio and deploying it to the workspace and integrating the Launchpad service and adding exposed content from an SAP S/4HANA system.

SAP Build Code

Apart from the SAP Build Big Picture session which provides an overview to SAP Build Code, we are piloting a new Expert Guided Implementation service on Cloud Application Programming Development using SAP Build Code. The purpose of this service is to empower customers with the knowledge of CAP development in SAP HANA Cloud and provide customers with the knowledge to develop and design in SAP HANA Cloud utilizing the SAP Business Application studio using SAP Build Code and the SAP AI co-pilot Joule. To find out more about this pilot through SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council, please reach out directly.

The e-learning Clean Core with SAP Business Technology Platform offers valuable insights to understand how SAP Business Technology Platform can help cultivate a cleaner and more sustainable core for SAP systems. It offers insights into how SAP BTP can support the fundamental pillars of data, integration, and extensibility. It explores the topic of extensibility in-depth and how the various components of SAP Business Technology Platform support the building of extensions in line with clean core principles.

For customers, if you have issues accessing the above links, there may be an authorizations issue. Please note a one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required for most of the above assets. A detailed step-by step guide to registration can be found here.

For internal colleagues, if you cannot access the above links, please use the following link, click on “Access” and use the above direct link once access has been granted.

We hope that this range of content and assets will support you in your digital transformation. For any queries in relation to any of the above assets, please reach out to us directly.

Thanks and Regards,

Robert Kelly

SAP BTP Lead Architect – SAP Enterprise Support
